ogTitle: Coasters Retreat vs Cobaki: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Coasters Retreat and Cobaki.
heading: Coasters Retreat vs Cobaki — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Coasters Retreat, New South Wales and Cobaki, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cobaki has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Coasters Retreat (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Coasters Retreat or Cobaki safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Coasters Retreat has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Cobaki scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Coasters Retreat scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Cobaki scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Coasters Retreat or Cobaki?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cobaki has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
